steps.title: Use the table points
steps.content:
From the table, two points on the line are $(0,22)$ and $(1,23)$. The slope is
$$
\frac{23-22}{1-0}=1
$$
The point with $x=0$ shows the $y$-intercept is $22$.

steps.title: Write the linear equation
steps.content:
A line with slope $1$ and $y$-intercept $22$ has equation
$$
y=x+22
$$
This also gives $y=24$ when $x=2$, so it matches the table.

steps.title: Choose the matching equation
steps.content: The only choice with slope $1$ and intercept $22$ is the matching equation. The answer is A.
